answers: SEO (Search Engine Optimization) = getting your website to rank higher on Google for relevant searches. Free traffic!
SEO basics: keyword research, quality content, proper headings (H1/H2), meta descriptions, fast site speed, and backlinks.
On-page SEO: use target keyword in title, URL, first paragraph, and headings. Write naturally — don't stuff keywords.
SEO tips: write long-form quality content, build backlinks from other sites, optimize images, and update old posts.
